title: Turnkey Industrial Electrification
description: End-to-end electrical design and engineering services from grid substations to factory floor switchgears.
features: HT/LT cable routing design and installation
Government licensing and electrical safety inspector approvals
Transformer and generator capacity sizing calculations
Factory commissioning load trials and testing

title: Custom Panel Fabrication
description: Tailored fabrication of electrical enclosures, custom PLC, APFC, MCC, and PCC panels.
features: 3D CAD assembly modeling and thermal calculations
CNC sheet steel cutting and precision punching
Busbar bending and primary injection testing
FAT (Factory Acceptance Testing) logs provided for clients

title: Chemical Earthing & Grounding Installation
description: Advanced copper-bonded chemical grounding systems complying with IS 3043 and IEEE grounding requirements.
features: High conductivity moisture-retaining carbon bentonite compound
Ground loop earth resistance testing and diagnostics
15+ years service life with zero degradation
Saves space over traditional salt/charcoal pits

title: Control Panel AMC & Maintenance
description: Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC) and preventive maintenance designed to minimize downtime in continuous process industries.
features: Scheduled relay calibration and terminal tightening checks
Vacuum circuit breaker (VCB) maintenance and lubrication
24x7 priority support deployment for grid trip emergencies
Capacitor health checks and MPP replacements
